ATL.offseason_summary: Lost WR Drake London to IR (torn ACL), signed WR Stefon Diggs (1yr), lost IDL Calais Campbell (retirement)

NO.offseason_summary: Signed QB Derek Carr extension, lost WR Chris Olave (trade to PHI)

TB.offseason_summary: Signed IDL Christian Wilkins, lost EDGE Shaq Barrett (retirement)

division_gaps.comment: NFC South IDL depth weakened (ATL lost Campbell, CAR is thin). If CAR drafts an elite EDGE, they immediately have the best pass rush in division with Phillips + draftee. Division currently has no elite TE — Sadiq would be unique weapon vs all 3 rivals.
